How tokens actually work  Every message you send causes Claude to reread the entire conversation from the start.  Message 1 costs 500 tokens. Message 30 costs 15,500 tokens.  That is 31x more for the same message.  One developer tracked a 100-message chat and found 98.5% of all tokens went toward rereading old history.  You are not running out. You are leaking.

Most developers are using Claude Code wrong.   They treat it like a coding assistant:  Prompt → Output → Repeat.   That works until it doesn’t.  Because real AI development isn’t about prompts.
